{{Quote|Oh dear. Oh, dear me. What would Master Jarstein think? To inflict harm on a fellow being… I suppose circumstances require it. Sir? Excuse me, sir? Do you mind if I…|M-3PO|<ref name="RPG" />}}
'''M-3PO''' was a [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] who was the property of an individual named [[Jarstein]]. At one point in his operational history, M-3PO aided an imprisoned [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] in an escape attempt. Garnet was impeded by restraints and encouraged M-3PO to strangle a [[Unidentified guard (Roark Garnet)|sleeping guard]] with a [[feather boa]]. Although M-3PO protested, citing the fact that he was not "programmed to attack [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings," he relented. However, M-3PO decided that the correct thing to do would be to ask the guard for permission and he did so. This decision caused Garnet some degree of exasperation, since M-3PO's query awoke the guard.<ref name="RPG" />
